title: An Act establishing flexibility for long term care facilities workers

abstracts.abstract: By Representative Lawn of Watertown, a petition (subject to Joint Rule 12) of John J. Lawn, Jr. for legislation to establish contract and coverage standards for health care worker platforms.  Labor and Workforce Development.
